completed_tasks.name: Fix background: replace norfair_upper.png tileset atlas with procedural cave draw
Fix hitbox: bottom-anchor collision (samusY = feet, not center)
Fix sprite left border line: sx +1 to skip black cell border pixel
Fix sprite bottom border line: reduce sh from 70 to 56, anchor dy to foot row 42
Remove block figure: delete drawSamusIdle + drawSamusJump
Add Playwright tests (7 tests, all passing)

remaining_tasks.name: Fix running animation behavior: idle=static, gameplay-ground=running
remaining_tasks.detail: WRONG behavior shipped: idle screen now has RAF loop animating Samus running in place (SamusRunGame.tsx Effect A). User wants STATIC standing pose on idle/gameover screens, and running animation ONLY when Samus is on the ground during active gameplay. In-game ground animation code is correct (Effect B uses runRight when !isAirborne) but Samus immediately jumps at game start (pendingJump=true) so the running animation is barely visible. Fix: (1) Revert Effect A back to single-render + ResizeObserver (static frame 0, no RAF loop). (2) Verify in-game ground running is visible during brief landing moments. (3) Fix the Playwright test — it currently passes by testing idle-screen animation which is the wrong behavior.

human_actions_pending.action: Verify fixes on production (Vercel deploy of v0.1.17)
human_actions_pending.context: Pushed to main, Vercel auto-deploys. Check background, hitbox, sprite borders, idle static pose.

decisions.decision: Replaced norfair_upper.png + norfair_lower.png with procedural cave draw
decisions.rationale: Both PNG files are Metroid Norfair tileset sprite atlases — not seamless background tiles. Tiling them produced the 'mashed together' look. Procedural draw (strata bands, lava, stalactites) is clean and correct.

decisions.decision: samusHeight changed from 60 to 44 in COLLISION constants
decisions.rationale: Pixel-inspected sprite sheet: actual head-to-feet height is 44 source pixels (rows 0-43). Old value of 60 made hitbox extend 16px above the sprite head.

decisions.decision: sh reduced from 70 to 56, dy anchored to foot row 42
decisions.rationale: Source rows 56-57 (y=258-259) are solid-black cell border pixels that were being drawn. Rows 44-55 are transparent. Row 42 is the last meaningful foot content. sh=56 cuts just before the border.

decisions.decision: sx shifted from contentOffset (17) to contentOffset+1 (18), sw reduced from 76 to 75
decisions.rationale: Pixel inspection confirmed x=17 is a black cell border pixel. Shifting +1 preserves the right edge at x=93.

next_action: Fix task 7: revert idle screen from animated RAF loop to static render (frame 0, ResizeObserver). Then fix the Playwright test to assert idle=static and in-game-ground=running.
context_notes: Session was bug fixes outside any formal GSD phase. All fixes committed (v0.1.16 fixes, v0.1.17 tests). One known regression shipped: idle screen animation was added but user wants static idle. The Playwright test for animation passes but tests the wrong thing (idle screen anim instead of in-game ground anim). Key file: components/samus-run/SamusRunGame.tsx Effect A (lines ~130-150).
